# CWE-765: Multiple Unlocks of a Critical Resource
lang: go
file: CWE-765-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var walletMu sync.Mutex
var walletBalance int

// Vulnerable: unlocks the mutex twice when validation fails.
func DebitWallet(c *gin.Context) {
	amount := c.GetInt("amount")
	walletMu.Lock()
	if amount <= 0 {
		walletMu.Unlock()
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusBadRequest)
		walletMu.Unlock()
		return
	}
	walletBalance -= amount
	walletMu.Unlock()
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"balance": walletBalance})
}
